Marvel Ultimate Spider-Man Titan Hero Series Action Figure 12 Inch (2 Styles)

Bring the power of the Spider-Verse home with these Marvel Ultimate Spider-Man Titan Hero Series figures! Standing tall and ready for battle, each 12-inch hero is sculpted with dynamic detail and bold colors straight from the animated series.

Key Features

  • OFFICIALLY LICENSED ACTION FIGURES - 12-inch action figures inspired by Marvel’s Ultimate Spider-Man animated series
  • 2 SPIDER-MAN STYLES - Includes Iron Spider or Miles Morales (Ultimate Spider-Man) characters (sold separately)
  • ACCURATE DESIGN - Highly detailed designs with bold, character-accurate colors
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of high-quality plastic ideal for imaginative play or collector display
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Official Titan Hero Series figures from Hasbro, for ages 4 and up

Product Specifications

  • Color: Red

Iron Spider Suit up like Tony Stark’s high-tech protégé! The Iron Spider figure features a striking red-and-gold design with enhanced armor inspired by Stark Industries. Built for big missions and even bigger showdowns, this 12-inch figure captures the essence of Iron Spider from the Ultimate Spider-Man universe, making it perfect for imaginative play or proud display.

Ultimate Spider-Man (Miles Morales) Swing into action with Miles Morales, the next-generation Spider-Man! Styled in his iconic black-and-red suit, this figure brings Miles' unique look and fearless spirit to life. Whether leaping into action or standing tall in your collection, this hero is ready to inspire kids and collectors alike.

Collect them both and build your ultimate team of web-slinging heroes! Perfect for fans of all ages, these figures deliver action, style, and adventure straight from the Marvel universe.
